mapper.insert: insert into sellers( user_id, company_name, business_number, representative_name, opening_date, business_address) values( #{user_id}, #{company_name}, #{business_number}, #{representative_name}, #{opening_date}, #{business_address} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sellers SET company_name = #{company_name}, business_number = #{business_number}, representative_name = #{representative_name}, opening_date = #{opening_date}, business_address = #{business_address} WHERE user_id = #{user_id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'PAID' THEN o.order_id END) AS newOrderCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'PREPARING' THEN o.order_id END) AS preparingCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'SHIPPING' THEN o.order_id END) AS shippingCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'DELIVERED' THEN o.order_id END) AS deliveredCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'RETURN_EXCHANGE' THEN o.order_id END) AS returnExchangeCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'CANCELLED' THEN o.order_id END) AS cancelledCount FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id WHERE p.seller_id = #{seller_id}

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'APPROVED' AND stock > 0 THEN 1 END) AS onSaleCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'APPROVED' AND stock = 0 THEN 1 END) AS outOfStockCount FROM products WHERE seller_id = #{seller_id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qnas q JOIN products p ON p.product_id = q.product_id WHERE p.seller_id = #{seller_id} AND q.answered_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews r JOIN products p ON p.product_id = r.product_id WHERE p.seller_id = #{seller_id}

SELECT DISTINCT o.order_id, o.user_id, o.total_amount, o.address_id, o.status, o.created_at, o.updated_at,
a.recipient_name AS receiver_name, a.phone AS receiver_phone,
CONCAT( '[', IFNULL(a.zipcode, ''), '] ', IFNULL(a.address, ''), ' ', IFNULL(a.detail_address, '') ) AS delivery_address
FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id LEFT JOIN addresses a ON a.address_id = o.address_id
WHERE p.seller_id = #{seller_id}
AND o.status = #{status}
ORDER BY o.order_id DESC

SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, oi.price, oi.quantity, p.name AS productName, p.image_l AS imageL, (oi.price * oi.quantity) AS subtotalAmount FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{order_id} AND p.seller_id = #{seller_id} ORDER BY oi.order_item_id ASC
